rows.finalText: "What is the next right step in my calling" is best read here through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. With Scythe (10) in the past, the reading shows where things already stand, and the picture is already being shaped by urgent prioritization is required. Here, Scythe emphasizes the necessary cut, refusal, or clean boundary that separates vocation from habit, urgency, or inherited expectation. Present centers on Mice (23), where the whole sequence either opens or tightens. Here, Mice emphasizes the small repeated drain that weakens conviction or meaning if it is left unaddressed. Future closes with Birds (12), and the directional message is communication quality shapes immediate outcomes when the pivot receives consistent attention. Birds often points to too many voices, anxious discussion, or mental noise making it harder to hear what the path is actually asking of you in your calling. The path becomes clearest where Scythe (10) meets Birds (12): a blend of cut and dialogue, asking you to choose cleanly and communicate implications while staying alert to amplifying rumor or speculation. Mice (23) shows where the whole sequence either opens or tightens. Here, Mice emphasizes the small repeated drain that weakens conviction or meaning if it is left unaddressed. Scythe (10) with Birds (12) keep emphasizing a blend of cut and dialogue, asking you to choose cleanly and communicate implications while staying alert to amplifying rumor or speculation. Patch leaks and simplify so Birds (12) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
